subject: [PATCH v3 10/20] zonefs: convert iomap ops to ->iomap_next()

reviews.author: Damien Le Moal
reviews.summary: Acked the patch without any comments or concerns.

2026-07-20.patch_summary: This patch series converts zonefs iomap operations to use the new ->iomap_next() callback, generated by a macro that wraps the iomap_iter_next() helper.
